# Functional Requirements / 機能要件 (Light Mode)

**Project**: QuickForm - Simple Form Builder
**Mode**: Light (MVP/PoC)
**Generated by**: requirements_designer

> Light Mode uses 5 essential fields per FR: Description, Actor, Main Flow, Exception Flow, Priority.

---

## FR-001: Form Creation / フォーム作成

| Field              | Value                                                                                                                                                                         |
| ------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **ID**             | FR-001                                                                                                                                                                        |
| **Description**    | Users can create forms by adding fields (text, email, number, dropdown, checkbox) via drag-and-drop. Each form has a title and optional description.                          |
| **説明**           | ユーザーはドラッグ&ドロップでフィールド（テキスト、メール、数値、ドロップダウン、チェックボックス）を追加してフォームを作成できる。各フォームにはタイトルと任意の説明がある。 |
| **Actor**          | Form Creator                                                                                                                                                                  |
| **Priority**       | Must (MoSCoW)                                                                                                                                                                 |
| **Main Flow**      | 1. User clicks "New Form" → 2. Enters form title → 3. Drags field types from palette to form canvas → 4. Configures field labels and validation rules → 5. Clicks "Save"      |
| **Exception Flow** | 3a. If maximum field count (20) reached → show "Maximum fields reached. Remove a field to add more."                                                                          |

---

## FR-002: Form Sharing / フォーム共有

| Field              | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **ID**             | FR-002                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| **Description**    | Users can publish a form and share it via a unique public URL. The form is accessible without authentication. Responses are collected in real-time.                                                                              |
| **説明**           | ユーザーはフォームを公開し、一意の公開URLで共有できる。フォームは認証なしでアクセス可能。回答はリアルタイムで収集される。                                                                                                        |
| **Actor**          | Form Creator                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| **Priority**       | Must (MoSCoW)                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| **Main Flow**      | 1. User clicks "Publish" on a saved form → 2. System generates a unique URL (e.g., quickform.app/f/abc123) → 3. User copies URL and shares via email/chat → 4. Respondents open URL and fill in form → 5. Submission is recorded |
| **Exception Flow** | 4a. If form has been unpublished → show "This form is no longer accepting responses"                                                                                                                                             |

---

## FR-003: Response Collection and Export / 回答収集・エクスポート

| Field              | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| ------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **ID**             | FR-003                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| **Description**    | Form creators can view responses in a table view and export all responses as a CSV file. Response count is shown on the form dashboard.                                                                     |
| **説明**           | フォーム作成者はテーブルビューで回答を閲覧し、全回答をCSVファイルとしてエクスポートできる。回答数はフォームダッシュボードに表示される。                                                                     |
| **Actor**          | Form Creator                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| **Priority**       | Must (MoSCoW)                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| **Main Flow**      | 1. User navigates to form dashboard → 2. Clicks on a form to see responses → 3. Table view shows all responses with timestamps → 4. User clicks "Export CSV" → 5. CSV file downloads with all response data |
| **Exception Flow** | 4a. If no responses exist → show "No responses yet. Share your form to start collecting."                                                                                                                   |
